## Parallel Execution Waves

### Wave 1: Foundation (Phase 1)
**Dependency**: None -- start immediately
**Execution**: Sequential (same file for T001/T002)

| Task | Agent | File(s) Modified | Parallel? |

| T001 | senior-backend-engineer | `INSTALL_MANIFEST.md` | No (T002 depends on T001) |

| T003 | senior-backend-engineer | `scripts/install.sh` (new) | After T001 conceptually, can overlap |

**Estimated Duration**: 45 min
**Checkpoint**: Manifest has parseable section, install.sh scaffold exists and is syntactically valid (`bash -n scripts/install.sh`)

## Quality Gates

| Gate | After Wave | Validation | Go/No-Go Criteria |
|------|-----------|------------|-------------------|
| **G1: Foundation** | Wave 1 | `bash -n scripts/install.sh` passes | Scaffold is syntactically valid |
| **G2: MVP** | Wave 2 | End-to-end fresh install test | All manifest files copied to empty target dir |
| **G3: Version Support** | Wave 3A | Version-pinned install + branch restore | Tag checkout works, branch restored on all exit paths |
| **G4: Documentation** | Wave 3B | Manual review of README + Guide | Scripted install primary, manual in collapsible block |
| **G5: Quality** | Wave 4 | Shellcheck clean + manifest path verification | Zero shellcheck warnings, all paths resolve |
| **G6: Release** | Wave 5 | `git describe --tags` | Returns valid version string |

## Timeline Summary

### Serial Execution (worst case)
```
Wave 1 (45 min) -> Wave 2 (3 hr) -> Wave 3A (2 hr) -> Wave 3B (45 min) -> Wave 4 (30 min) -> Wave 5 (10 min)
Total: ~7 hr
```

### Parallel Execution (optimized)
```
Wave 1 (45 min) -> Wave 2 (3 hr) -> [Wave 3A (2 hr) || Wave 3B (25 min)] -> Wave 4 (20 min) -> Wave 5 (10 min)
Total: ~6.25 hr
```

### Estimates

| Scenario | Duration | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| Optimistic | 5 hr | No rework, all checkpoints pass first try |
| Realistic | 6.25 hr | With Phase 3/4 parallelism |
| Pessimistic | 10 hr | Bash 3.2 compat issues, trap handler rework |
